a.label: Laurent valuation v_t(f)
a.standard_term: order of vanishing (valuation) of a Laurent series

b.label: PoleOrder(R[g_DBP]) at role boundaries
b.standard_term: pole order of scalar curvature of the DBP metric family at role-singular boundaries

evidence.label: Theorem 2 — Channel divergence produces inverse-metric bound
evidence.summary: Claim. If `v_t(κ_{c,i})=-2m`, then the corresponding inverse-channel metric component has `v_t(g_DBP,ii) = 2m` unless cancelled by the surface restriction / coordinate projection. Proof method. Exact inversion of diagona

evidence.label: Candidate theorem statement, v0
evidence.summary: Let `γ(t)` be a one-parameter exact-ℚ or exact-symbolic family crossing a role stratum at `t = 0`. Let `y(t)` be the unsolvable output derivative for that role... Assume `v_t(y) = m > 0`... Let `Λ_i(t)` be the transporte

evidence.label: Role-Singularity Valuation Law — candidate statement v0
evidence.summary: Let `γ(t)` be a one-parameter exact-ℚ or exact-symbolic family crossing a role stratum at `t = 0`. Let `y(t)` be the unsolvable output derivative for that role, e.g. `y(t) = a(t) = f_D(γ(t))` or `y(t) = b(t) = f_S(γ(t))`
